title: UPESSC UP Assistant Professor BEd Online Form 2026 for 107 Post
short_information: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC has relased UPHESC Assistant Professor BEd Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Uttar Pradesh UP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2025 Exam can Re Apply Apply Online from 28 April 2026 to 27 May 2026. Read the notification for UPHESC Assistant Professor BEd Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC UPESSC UP Assistant Professor BEd Recruitment 2025 UPHESC Asst. Professor Advt No. : 51| Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General/OBC/EWS : 2000/- SC / ST / PH : 1000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Fee Through Offline Mode Only. UPHESC Assistant Professor
eligibility: Assistant Professor Bed 107 Master Degree in Science / Mathematics / Social Science / Commerce / Language (BED Subjects) with Minimum 55% Marks, M.Ed Exam with 55% Marks OR Master Degree in Sociology with 55% Marks with B.Ed / BLEd / Equivalent Degree. UGC NET / PHd / D.Phill More Details Read the Notification How to Fill UPHESC Assistant Professor Online Form 2026 Note : Applicants who have already applied under the B.Ed subject need to apply again. Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC, Uttar Pradesh Higher Education Service Commission UPHESC 51 Are Issued Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025 – Advt No. 51. Candidate Can Re Apply Apply Between 28/04/2026 to 27/05/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPESSC Advt No. 51 Assistant Professor BEd Subject Recruitment 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online. Download Mobile Apps for the Latest Updates Android Apps Apple IOS Apps Some Useful

tables.table_name: UPHESC Assistant Professor Notification 2025 : Age Limit Details Minimum Age : NA Maximum Age : 62 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per UPHESC Assistant Professor Recruitment Rules.
